# CortIQ

> First-to-market web analytics platform with dedicated AI agent tracking — ChatGPT Browser, Perplexity Comet, Claude Browser. Built for the Agentic Web.

CortIQ combines cookie-free server-side analytics, GDPR-compliant consent management, and behavioral analytics. Developed by Expandtalk Corporation, Sweden.

## Product capabilities

- **Agentic Browser Analytics**: Detect and track AI browsers (ChatGPT Browser, Perplexity Comet, Claude Browser). Agent journey funnels, conversion attribution, browser type classification (visual/headless/text-based), citation and training crawler tracking.
- **Cookie-Free Analytics**: 100% server-side tracking. No cookies, no IP storage, no fingerprinting. Compliant with Swedish PTS and EU ePrivacy directive. No consent banner required for base analytics.
- **CMP with Nudging**: Smart consent banners with behavioral nudging for higher opt-in rates. Combines banner-free base metrics with richer opt-in data.
- **Click Maps**: Heatmaps showing click patterns per page and device type (desktop/tablet/mobile).
- **A/B Testing**: Two-variant testing with built-in statistical significance.
- **Form Analytics**: Funnel visualization, field-level drop-off data.
- **Session Recording**: Record and replay user sessions.
- **Geolocation Maps**: Visitor density by country, region and city.
- **KPI Dashboards**: Customizable KPI tracking, goal configuration and behavioral alerts.
- **Data Warehouse**: Sync to BigQuery, Snowflake, Redshift, PostgreSQL, MySQL.
- **GA4 Integration**: Server-side GA4 for paid ads attribution.

## What CortIQ does NOT offer

- Scroll heatmaps or attention maps (click maps only)
- Multivariate testing (two-variant A/B only)
- Mobile app analytics

## Access

Invite-only beta. Website: https://cortiq.se

## Tracking script

https://cortiq.se/spa-tracking.js — drop-in JavaScript for any site (heatmaps, session recording, AI agent detection, UTM, form analytics).

## Company

Expandtalk Corporation — Sweden. GDPR-compliant, EU-hosted.
